subcodes.first_line: O pure God, loving Lord! These companions are captivated by Thy fragrance and bewildered in Thy path, freed from every bond [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک يزدانا محبوب مهربانا اين ياران آشفتهء بوی تو اند و سر گشتهء کوی تو از هر قيدی رستند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
